title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates how to build an effective AI harness layer around Claude Code for large codebases, showing that the surrounding infrastructure (CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, plugins) matters more than the model itself. The video walks through constructing each component of what he calls the AI Layer using a practical example codebase.
